title: Citation Requirements – IS3513
headerSubtitle: 10 Minimum · APA Format · Word Built-In Tools

sections.html: Citations aren’t bureaucratic hoop-jumping — they’re credibility builders. A client can’t see your skills directly. They see your work. Every citation says: “I did the homework. You can trust this.”

sections.label: Deduction:
sections.html: −10% per missing citation. 10 citations required. Zero citations = −100%. This requirement is non-negotiable.

sections.label: The Math Is Simple
sections.tip: Each module has 18–26 natural citation opportunities. If you’re actually documenting your methodology, 10 is trivially easy. If you’re struggling to find 10, you’re not doing the research that makes your work credible.

sections.label: Avoid:
sections.html: Random forum posts • AI-generated content • Sources you didn’t actually read • Anything behind a paywall you didn’t access • Wikipedia as a primary source

sections.label: How to Cite — Using Microsoft Word
paragraphs: Use Word’s built-in citation tools. Do not type references manually — Word automates formatting and bibliography generation.
items: Place your cursor where the citation belongs in the text
Go to References → Insert Citation → Add New Source
Fill in source details (author, title, URL, date accessed)
At document end: References → Bibliography → Insert Bibliography
Before submitting: Select All (Ctrl+A) then Update Fields (F9)
sections.tip: Style: APA format. Consistency matters. All citations in your document should use the same style.

sections.label: Where Citations Naturally Fit
paragraphs:
Report SectionTypical Citation Opportunities
RunbookTool documentation, command syntax references, man pages
MethodologyIndustry standards, frameworks (NIST, OWASP), best practices
FindingsCVE references, vendor advisories, vulnerability databases
RecommendationsHardening guides, CIS benchmarks, vendor documentation

sections.label: Pro Tip:
sections.html: Cite as you work. Keep a running list of sources as you move through each lab. When you look something up, add it immediately. Reconstructing your sources after the fact is painful and usually incomplete.
Ten citations minimum. No exceptions. Build credibility.
